achievements.title: Before You Search for Lost Heaven...
achievements.description: Beginner difficulty and changing difficulty are not allowed, retrying fights is fine (unless you pick Lower Difficulty and Retry, which will lock you out of achievements for the fight), NG+ must be on Infinity difficulty
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Start of a Handyman
achievements.description: Check the mailbox to get your first two quests in the Prologue. Welcome to Nayuta no Kiseki!
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Remembering the Departed
achievements.description: Visit the Herschel family grave before meeting Lyra in the prologue

achievements.description: Help Dorado out, along with learning his eating tendencies

achievements.description: Enjoy playing a game with Vel... is it a complement or an insult to say that a kid can make Phantom Thief B's kinds of puzzles?
